channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  2. 2026 NFL free agency: Top players, predictions, sleepers  ESPN
  3. NFL free agents: Top 5 quarterbacks include Kyler Murray, and some old vets like Kirk Cousins and Aaron Rodgers  Yahoo Sports
  4. Ranking the top 10 free agent wide receivers in 2026  USA Today
  5. When can NFL free agents sign? NFL 'legal tampering' period, explained  USA Today

item.title: Trump to POLITICO: ‘I really don’t care’ if Iran plays in World Cup - Politico
item.description:
1. Trump to POLITICO: ‘I really don’t care’ if Iran plays in World Cup  Politico
  2. Seattle leaders mark 100 days until FIFA World Cup with artwork, security plans  KATU
  3. US President Donald Trump does not care if Iran play at 2026 World Cup  BBC
  4. President of Iran’s soccer federation says World Cup participation in US is in doubt  Yahoo Sports
  5. Donald Trump ‘really does not care’ if Iran play at World Cup 2026  The Guardian

item.title: Congress taking first votes on Iran war as debate rages about US goals - AP News
item.description:
1. Congress taking first votes on Iran war as debate rages about US goals  AP News
  2. US lawmakers set to vote on war powers as Iran conflict widens  Reuters
  3. Senate to vote on resolution that would prevent Trump continuing Iran war | First Thing  The Guardian
  4. Congress to Vote on Ending the War on Iran  Foreign Policy
  5. Senate to vote on forcing Trump to end Iran strikes  The Washington Post
